zh.Milan, Milano, Lombardia, Italy: 義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾
zh.lifeSummary: 當Thaddea Visconti於1351年出生在義大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾時，她的父親Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy28歲，母親Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan20歲。她於1364年10月13日與Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern在德國貝也英格爾斯塔特結婚。他們至少是2個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1381年9月28日在德國貝也明陳享年30歲，埋葬在德國貝也明陳。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thaddea Visconti于1351年出生在意大利隆巴迪亞米蘭諾米蘭諾时，她的父亲Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy28岁，母亲Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan20岁。她于1364年10月13日与Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern在德国貝也英格爾斯塔特结婚。他们至少是2个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1381年9月28日在德国貝也明陳享年30岁，埋葬在德国貝也明陳。

nameMeanings.name: Visconti
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Salvatore, Pasquale, Rocco, Umberto, Amerigo, Angelo, Carlo, Domenic, Ennio, Gaetano, Gerlando, Gino.  French Laurent, Camille, Girard.

Italian: from visconte, a title of rank (medieval Latin vicecomes ‘deputy of a count’). Unusually (since most noble families took their surnames from their estates), the surname was sometimes of literal application, but without doubt it is also in part a nickname for someone who gave himself airs and graces, and in part a metonymic occupational name for someone in the employ of a viscount. This surname is also found in southern France.

variants.name: Viscomi
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Emilio, Salvatore, Antonio, Beniamino, Filomena, Mario, Rodolfo, Santo.
Italian: Sicilian and Calabrian form of Visconti , from medieval Latin viscomes ‘deputy’, Greek biskōmēs.

en.lifeSummary: When Thaddea Visconti was born in 1351, in Milano, Milan, Lombardy, Italy, her father, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, was 28 and her mother, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, was 20. She married Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern on 13 October 1364, in Ingolstadt, Bavaria, Germany. They were the parents of at least 2 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 28 September 1381, in Munich, Bavaria, Germany, at the age of 30, and was buried in Munich, Bavaria, Germany.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thaddea Visconti est née en 1351, à Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italie, son père, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, avait 28 ans et sa mère, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, avait 20 ans. Elle a épousé Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern le 13 octobre 1364, à Ingolstadt, Bayern, Allemagne. Ils ont eu au moins 2 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 28 septembre 1381, à München, Bayern, Allemagne, à l’âge de 30 ans, et a été enterrée à München, Bayern, Allemagne.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thaddea Visconti 1351 in Milano, Milano, Lombardei, Italien geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy 28 und ihre Mutter Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan 20. Sie hat am 13. Oktober 1364 in Ingolstadt, Bayern, Deutschland Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 2 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 28. September 1381 im Alter von 30 Jahren in München, Bayern, Deutschland und wurde in München, Bayern, Deutschland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thaddea Visconti è nata il nel 1351 nel Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, sua padre, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, aveva 28 anni e sua madre, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, aveva 20 anni. Lei sposato Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern il 13 ottobre 1364, nel Ingolstadt, Bayern, Germania. Erano genitori di almeno 2 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 28 settembre 1381, nel München, Bayern, Germania, all'età di 30 anni, e fu sepolta a München, Bayern, Germania.

ja.Milan, Milano, Lombardia, Italy: イタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノ
ja.lifeSummary: Thaddea Viscontiが1351年にイタリアロンバーディアミラノミラノで生まれた時，父Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardyは28歳，母Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milanは20歳であった。1364年10月13日にドイツバイエルンインゴルスタトでStephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayernと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも2人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1381年9月28日にドイツバイエルンムuンチェンで30歳で死去し，ドイツバイエルンムuンチェンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thaddea Visconti(이)가 1351년 이탈리아 롬바디아 미랜오 미랜오에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy(은)는 28세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 1364년 10월 13일 독일 베이른 잉스타드트에서 Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 두 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1381년 9월 28일 독일 베이른 u천에서 30세의 나이로 사망했으며 독일 베이른 u천에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thaddea Visconti nasceu em 1351, em Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Itália, seu pai, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tinha 28 anos e sua mãe, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tinha 20 anos. Ela casou-se com Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern em 13 de outubro de 1364, em Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemanha. Eles tiveram pelo menos 2 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 28 de setembro de 1381, em München, Bayern, Alemanha, com 30 anos, e foi sepultada em München, Bayern, Alemanha.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thaddea Visconti родилась в 1351 г. в местности милано, милано, ломбардя, Италия, её отцу по имени Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy было 28 лет, а матери, которую звали Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern 13 октября 1364 г. в местности инголстадт, беиирн, Германия. У них было по крайней мере 2 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 28 сентября 1381 г. в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия в возрасте 30 лет и была похоронена в местности мuнчэн, беиирн, Германия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thaddea Visconti nació en 1351, en Milano, Milano, Lombardia, Italia, su papá, Barnabo di Visconti Signore di Milano Duke of Lombardy Duke of Lombardy, tenía 28 años y su mamá, Beatrice Regina Della Scala Lady of Milan, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Stephan III “der Kneißl”, Herzog von Bayern el 13 de octubre de 1364, en Ingolstadt, Bayern, Alemania. Fueron padres de por lo menos 2 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 28 de septiembre de 1381, en München, Bayern, Alemania, a la edad de 30 años, y fue sepultada en München, Bayern, Alemania.
